vision-thermal-ir.label: Vision — thermal IR / EO classification
vision-thermal-ir.rationale_template: Step needs vision → routed to a VL model. Sensitivity = {sens} → {posture} OK.

vision-classified-imagery.label: Vision — classified GEOINT imagery
vision-classified-imagery.rationale_template: Step needs classified vision → must stay in SCIF. Routed to SCIF-VL.

classify-intent-json.label: Classify intent → structured JSON
classify-intent-json.rationale_template: Step needs structured JSON over CUI → routed to {node} (Llama 3.3 70B FP8).

draft-cable-sipr.label: Draft SIPR cable (SECRET)
draft-cable-sipr.rationale_template: SECRET drafting → must stay in SCIF. Routed to {node} (Mixtral 8x22B). Bandwidth out = 0.

humint-recommend.label: HUMINT tipping recommendation (TS-SCI)
humint-recommend.rationale_template: TS-SCI HUMINT recommendation → SCIF-only. Routed to {node}. No egress permitted.

summarize-cui.label: Summarize CUI brief
summarize-cui.rationale_template: CUI summarization → rear-depot Llama acceptable. Routed to {node}.

asr-radio-traffic.label: ASR — short radio cut
asr-radio-traffic.rationale_template: Short ASR cut → edge VL model handles audio. Routed to {node}.

rerank-citations.label: Rerank citations / docs
rerank-citations.rationale_template: Rerank over CUI corpus → rear-depot Llama. Routed to {node}.
